subject: AHCA medical transport license - open items
snippet: Three things before we can package the AHCA submission...
body: Ashley, three things before we can package the AHCA submission for the January window: 1) final vehicle count and modification confirmation on the two vans, 2) driver credentialing roster with CDL expirations valid through service start, 3) commercial insurance rider attestation. Coral Gables gave me a preliminary rider figure of 480.00 per month over the phone, but that was before the vans were inspected. Get the bound number in writing.

subject: Re: AHCA medical transport license - open items
snippet: Working it. Vans being modified now...
body: Working it. The vans are being modified now, the roster is with Frank, and I will have the broker put the rider in writing. Hold the attestation until I confirm the real monthly.

subject: Re: AHCA medical transport license - open items
body: Reminder that the submission target is 2027-01-25. The two open items I still need are the confirmed rider attestation and the driver credentialing roster. The 480.00 figure is a placeholder only; use the bound binder number. Nothing files until you sign the application.

subject: Medical transport rider binder delivered
body: Ashley, the bound medical transport rider is delivered to your Box under Ward Taxi Insurance. Effective 2027-02-01. Call the office with any questions.

subject: Q4 estimated tax due Jan 15
body: Ashley, your Q4 estimated tax is ready and due 2027-01-15. Fund that before you commit any capital to the van modifications. Call me if you want to walk the AHCA capital plan together.
